title: houstonia acerosa var. polypremoides
intro: Houstonia acerosa var. polypremoides, also known as the Polypremum or Rockrose Houstonia, is a plant species in the family Gentianaceae. It is a shrubby perennial herb with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various ailments. The plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
